Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust, Request For Surcharge Of Trustee And Other Remedies
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Continued To Feb-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PTR-23-306266 The Paula Mendenhall Revocable Trust and PTR-23-306268 The Paula Mendenhall Revocable Trust.

Appearances: Richard Franceschini appeared via zoom for Dominic and Damian Buoni (petitioners).
Catherine Koss appeared via zoom for Mary Nasser (respondent).

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than January 10, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by January 17, 2024. The matter is continued to February 07, 2024 and the Parties are to return on February 07, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.
The joint status report is to address status of mediation, any outstanding discovery issues and timelines, what the claims are, the factual issues, the time estimate of the evidentiary hearing, who the witnesses will be and time estimates of witness testimony.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.
